mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, article_count, comment_count, favorite_count, follower_count, following_count, like_received, view_count, update_time FROM sys_user_stats WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_stats (user_id, article_count, comment_count, favorite_count, follower_count, following_count, like_received, view_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{articleCount}, #{commentCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{followerCount}, #{followingCount}, #{likeReceived}, #{viewCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user_stats SET following_count = following_count + #{increment} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE sys_user_stats SET follower_count = follower_count + #{increment} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
